dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S3747 IS: Home School Graduation Recognition Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mrs. Moody (for herself and Mr. Banks) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Health, Education, Labor, and Pensions

form.official-title: To amend the Higher Education Act of 1965 to recognize students who have completed secondary school education in a home school setting as high school graduates, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Home School Graduation Recognition Act.
Section 484(d) of the Higher Education Act of 1965 (20 U.S.C. 1091(d)) is amended—

paragraph.text: in the heading of such subsection, by striking Who Are Not High School Graduates and inserting From Non-Traditional Settings; and
by adding at the end the following:

For purposes of this title, a student who has completed a secondary school education in a home school setting that is treated as a home school or private school under State law shall be considered a high school graduate.
